title: Paul Anthony 'Monoblade' Induction Wet or Dry 3 in 1 Shaver, Styler & Beard Trimmer - H5022
features: MONOBLADE: The Paul Anthony Monoblade has a 30mm wide double edged shaving head, is angled at 45 degrees for maximum cutting performance and cuts to a 0.3mm hair depth. So close you would think it was a barbers cut. A spare monoblade head is also provided.

INDUCTION CHARGING CASE: The stylish hard plastic storage case also acts as an induction charger when plugged into a USB power source, keeping your shaver in peak charge. A full charge taking up to 5hrs.
WET OR DRY: The Monoblade is IPX7 waterproof rated which can be used in the shower or rinsed under the tap. Foams and gels can also be used with this shaver.

3 in 1 SHAVE, STYLE or TRIM: The Monoblade will shave, style or trim your facial hair. Three stubble and beard combs provide a neat and styles beard to depths of 1mm for that shadow, or 3mm or 5mm for the more styled appearance.

LITHIUM POWERED: The long life, fast charging lithium battery offers around 90 minutes use from a full charge. When the shaver is plugged into a USB power source directly it takes less than 2hrs to fully charge, or 5 hrs when using the induction case. Power Source not provided.
description: Product Description The Paul Anthony Wet and Dry Monoblade gives a smooth and comfortable performance whether using as a shaver, beard trimmer or styler. Using new fine trimming technology the Monoblade glides on the skin surface to reduce razor burn or ingrown hairs to 0.3mm depth. Fine segmented and double edged blades are precision angled at 45 degrees to enhance the cut with no pulling or dragging and no need for sharpening. Three specific depth combs (1mm, 3mm and 5mm) for a clean and precise shadow stubble or short beard Charge directly from the induction case so the shaver/trimmer is ready when required. Safe and convenient and pauses charging when battery is fully charged. Requires USB power Source, not supplied. Pack contains: 1x Paul Anthony Monoblade Shaver 1x indusction Case 3x Beard Combs (1mm, 3mm and 5mm) 1x Replacement Monoblade Head 1x Cleaning Brush 1x USB Charging Cable 1x Instruction Manual Safety Warning Always unplug the shaver from the power source before use. Do not use the shaver while it is charging. Keep the shaver away from water while charging. Be cautious when handling the shaver to avoid cuts from the sharp blades. Always follow the cleaning instructions to prevent bacterial growth.
